subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! I find myself now in the precincts of Thy supreme mercy, beneath the shadow of Thy Most Exalted Name [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحانک اللهم یا الهی امسیت حینئذ فی جوار رحمتک الکبری فی ظل اسمک العلی
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @pain of love; love as veil, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @prayer for nearness to God
